svg.title: Spec-First Engineering Layers - Deep Knowledge Map 2025
svg.desc: A comprehensive knowledge infographic showing the three nested engineering layers with industry insights, best practices, and relationships.

g.text: "If you only focus on the engine and fuel,
you can still build a terrible car."
What to ask · 塑造如何询问模型
• 框架: PERSONA + TASK + CONTEXT + FORMAT
• 工具调用 · 结构化输出 (JSON Schema)
• 最小单元 · 聚焦局部响应质量
What to send · 控制模型能看到什么
• 智能分块: 500-1000 tokens with overlap
• 渐进式披露 · 防止上下文腐烂
How it operates · 系统如何运行
• Mitchell Hashimoto: "每次代理犯错，设计环境让它不能以同样方式再犯"
• LangChain: 同样模型，更好的Harness，从Top30外到Top5 (Terminal Bench 2.0)
• 决定上下文何时加载、哪些工具可用、哪些动作允许、失败如何处理
>32K tokens 时正确率开始下降
不要把上下文窗口当垃圾场
渐进式披露 > 一次性倾倒
程序员工作转变：设计代理栖息地
"LLMs are like a new kind of operating system, where the model acts as the CPU
and its context window functions as the RAM."
Sources: Louis Bouchard · DecodingAI · Mitchell Hashimoto · Andrej Karpathy · OpenAI · Anthropic · LangChain
